def positive_startup_log_statement_includes_raw_secret_value():
    rule_id = "startup_log_statement_includes_raw_secret_value"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Startup or health-check log statement interpolates a raw secret, key, or password value."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
